sentences.arabic: طَلَبَ الطِّفْلُ مِنْ أُمِّهِ أَنْ تُصَوِّرَهُ.
sentences.translation: Dijete je zamolilo majku da ga fotografiše.
sentences.translationEn: The child asked his mother to take his photo.

sentences.translation: Majka je uzela telefon i pogledala ga.
sentences.translationEn: The mother held the phone and looked at him.

sentences.translation: Rekla je: Nasmij se i gledaj u kameru.
sentences.translationEn: She said: Smile and look at the camera.

sentences.arabic: الْتَقَطَتِ الصُّورَةَ وَأَعْطَتِ الطِّفْلَ يَنْظُرُ إِلَيْهَا.
sentences.translation: Snimila je fotografiju i dala djetetu da je gleda.
sentences.translationEn: She took the photo and let the child look at it.
